headlineLabel: 2009. Twitter. Digital Communities, solved. What’s happening right now? 2014. Slack. Organizations, solved. What’s happening at work? 2026. Human Conversation. Real-world social networks, unsolved. What’s happening between us, around us, and within us? Systems needs to understand what’s happening — and know what to do next.
headlineText: 200920142026twitterDigital Communities ✓ SolvedWhat’s happening right now?twitterNov 19 · 2009What’s happening?slackOrganizations ✓ SolvedWhat’s happening at work?slack# general# product# randomHuman ConversationReal-world social networks ✕ UnsolvedWhat’s happening between us, around us, and within us?
ledeText: Systems needs to understand what’s happening — and know what to do next.
storyMarkers: Our human, social, and community data has always, and will always be communicated through Human Conversation.
99.9% of communication technology puts an interface between us.
Members feel remembered. Builders stay present.
A life that runs on Human Conversation and connected experiences.
